description: Create an Action Plan Item Assignee. NOTE: Though both body `party_id` and `role` parameters are marked as required below, at least one of the two needs to be passed in (i.e., if you pass in a `role` then you do not need to also pass in a `party_id`, and vice versa, though you can pass in both parameters)

plan_item_id.description: Plan Item ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee

created_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item Assignee was created

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

is_locked.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee was added prior to an Action Plan's approval

first_name.description: First name of the Party Person

last_name.description: Last name of the Party Person

name.description: Full name of the Party Person

user_id.description: Login Information ID associated with the Party Person

is_employee.description: Indicates whether Party is an Employee of the current Company

login.description: Login Information associated with the Party Person

updated_at.description: Time the Party Person was updated

id.description: Vendor ID of the Party Person

name.description: Vendor Name of the Party Person

plan_id.description: Plan ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee

role.description: Role of the Action Plan Item Assignee

first_name.description: First name of the Party Person

last_name.description: Last name of the Party Person

name.description: Full name of the Party Person

user_id.description: User ID associated with the Party Person

is_employee.description: Indicates whether Party is an Employee of the current Company

login.description: User Login associated with the Party Person

updated_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item Assignee was updated

active.description: Specifies if the Action Plan Verification Method is intended for use

plan_item_id.description: Action Plan Item ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

is_holding.description: Indicates whether or not the Action  Item Assignee's signature is holding

party_id.description: Party Person ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

role.description: Role of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

verification_method_id.description: Verification Method ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set
